content:
Modal Auxiliaries

Modal Auxiliaries ဆိုတာ verb ရှေ့မှာထားပြီး အဓိပ္ပာယ်ပြောင်းပေးတဲ့ စကားလုံးအသေးတွေပါ။ can, could, may, might, must, should, would, ought to စတာတွေ ပါတယ်။

Structure/Formula: Subject + Modal Verb + Base form of verb (V1)

👉 He can speak English fluently. → He cannot speak English fluently.

👉 You must obey your parents. → You must not disobey your parents.

👉 She may come to the party tomorrow. → She may not come to the party tomorrow.

👉 We should respect our teachers. → We should not disrespect our teachers.

🔑 Key Points:

  • Modal verb နောက်မှာ always base form of verb (V1) ကိုသာ သုံးရမယ်
  • Modal verb တွေက person (I, you, he, she) ပေါ်မူတည်ပြီး ပုံစံမပြောင်းဘူး
  • can = ability, may = permission/possibility, must = necessity, should = advice

⚠️ Common Mistakes:

  • ❌ He can speaks English → ✅ He can speak English (s/es/th မထည့်ရ)
  • ❌ You must to go → ✅ You must go (to မထည့်ရ)
  • ❌ She should goes → ✅ She should go (goes မသုံးရ)
